faqs.question: What pests are most common in Prospect Lefferts Gardens?
faqs.answer: Prospect Lefferts Gardens residents most frequently deal with cockroaches, mice, ants, and bed bugs. Our general pest control service addresses all these common pests with comprehensive treatment plans.
